response.original_title: [[ Help~desK]]  What does Coinbase Wallet do? (Start Your Support Chat)
response.overview: Coinbase Wallet  [US] ☎ +1-(888)-634-2381 [united states] is a self-custody cryptocurrency wallet designed to give users full control over their digital assets. Unlike holding crypto directly on an exchange, this  [US] ☎ +1-(888)-634-2381 [united states] wallet allows you to store, manage, and interact with your crypto independently. That means you control your private keys, which are the secure [US] ☎ +1-(888)-634-2381 [united states]  codes that prove ownership of your funds.
response.title: [[ Help~desK]]  What does Coinbase Wallet do? (Start Your Support Chat)
